ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Full name of the company */,
  "shortname" TEXT /* Short name or abbreviation of the company */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Contact person for the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedstocks" (
  "feedstock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedstock */,
  "feedstock_name" TEXT /* Name of the feedstock (e.g., Woody Biomass, Agricultural Residue) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the feedstock */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., forest, agricultural) */,
  "carbon_footprint" REAL /* Estimated carbon footprint of the feedstock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedstock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conversion_technologies" (
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conversion technology */,
  "technology_name" TEXT /* Name of the conversion technology (e.g., Biochemical, Thermochemical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conversion technology */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the technology (percentage) */,
  "patent_info" TEXT /* Information about patents related to the technology */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company leading the project */,
  "foa" TEXT /* Funding opportunity announcement (FOA) for the project */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "feedstock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the feedstock used in the project */,
  "technology_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conversion technology used in the project */,
  "primary_product" TEXT /* Primary product of the project (e.g., Ethanol, Biodiesel) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the project is based */,
  "scale" TEXT /* Scale of the project (e.g., Commercial, Demonstration) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "program_id" INTEGER /* ID of the program under which the project is funded */,
  "annual_output" REAL /* Estimated annual output of the primary product */,
  "environmental_impact" TEXT /* Summary of the environmental impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("program_id") REFERENCES programs ("program_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_feedstock_id FOREIGN KEY ("feedstock_id") REFERENCES feedstocks ("feedstock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_technology_id FOREIGN KEY ("technology_id") REFERENCES conversion_technologies ("technology_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the project is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the project is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the project is located */,
  "zipcode" TEXT /* Zipcode of the project location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the project location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the project location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project receiving the award */,
  "doegrant" REAL /* DOE Grant number for the award */,
  "osti_final" TEXT /* OSTI Final report URL for the award */,
  "costshare" REAL /* Cost share amount for the award */,
  "total_project_cost" REAL /* Total project cost for the award */,
  "award_date" TEXT /* Date when the award was granted */,
  "funding_agency" TEXT /* Agency that provided the funding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "factsheets" (
  "factsheet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each factsheet */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project associated with the factsheet */,
  "factsheet_url" TEXT /* URL of the factsheet */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the factsheet */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the factsheet was published */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author(s) of the factsheet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factsheet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_factsheets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the program */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the program started */,
  "end_year" INTEGER /* Year when the program ended or is expected to end */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, stakeholder) */,
  "email" TEXT /* User's email address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
